component.name: VaultSign
component.summary: HashiCorp Vault OIDC Authentication & SSH Key Signing

description.p: VaultSign provides a desktop GUI for authenticating with HashiCorp Vault using OIDC and signing SSH certificates. Features include multiple config profiles, dynamic role fetching, certificate expiry monitoring, and desktop notifications.
Major release with v2 enhancements: config profiles, certificate expiry monitoring, token auto-renewal, theme toggle, keyboard shortcuts, dynamic role fetching, and packaging support.
